test.create_query: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS test_logical_functions_large
CREATE TABLE test_logical_functions_large._2_0_UInt8 (x1 UInt8, x2 UInt8) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE test_logical_functions_large._2_1_UInt8 (x1 UInt8, x2 UInt8) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_logical_functions_large._2_0_UInt8 SELECT materialize(0) AS x1, materialize(0) AS x2 FROM zeros(810000000)
INSERT INTO test_logical_functions_large._2_1_UInt8 SELECT materialize(1) AS x1, materialize(1) AS x2 FROM zeros(810000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_logical_functions_large._2_0_UInt8 WHERE NOT ignore(and(x1,x2))
SELECT count() FROM test_logical_functions_large._2_0_UInt8 WHERE NOT ignore(or(x1,x2))
SELECT count() FROM test_logical_functions_large._2_1_UInt8 WHERE NOT ignore(or(x1,x2))
